hero.title: CTR UNIFIED
hero.subtitle:
One Team. Multiple Sports.
Unlimited Possibilities.
hero.about_body: CTR Unified is a multi-sport organization that brings together athletes, teams, and sporting communities under one unified platform. From cricket and volleyball to Formula 4 racing and emerging sports, CTR Unified promotes excellence, teamwork, innovation, and competitive spirit across all disciplines.

sports.name: Pickleball
sports.description: Explosive hand-speed, compact court strategy, and doubles chemistry define CTR's pickleball identity.

sports.name: Volleyball
sports.description: Vertical athleticism and controlled transition play power our volleyball program across elite competitions.

sports.name: Cricket
sports.description: Structured batting depth, precision bowling plans, and relentless fielding standards anchor this unit.

sports.name: Field Hockey
sports.description: Pace-driven pressing and disciplined circle execution make our hockey program sharp and competitive.

sports.name: Formula 4 Racing
sports.description: From telemetry to racecraft, the F4 pathway develops next-generation circuit talent with measurable rigor.

sports.name: CTR Academy
sports.description: Academy programs blend motorsport science, athlete conditioning, and team discipline into one track-ready system.

sports.name: CTR Karting League
sports.description: The karting league identifies young drivers early and builds race intelligence through structured progression.

sports.name: Indian National Car Racing Championship
sports.description: A professional national ladder connecting karting graduates to full circuit competition under one unified banner.
